name: Starliege Paladynamo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>輝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>子</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>パラディオス
desc:
2 Level 4 LIGHT monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 2 Xyz Materials from this card, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change its ATK to 0, and if you do, it has its effects negated. If this card you control is destroyed by an opponent's card (by battle or card effect) and sent to your GY: Draw 1 card.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
